scripts.prebuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const src=p.join('projects-portfolio','finora');const dest=p.join('public','finora');if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.rmSync(dest,{recursive:true,force:true});fs.cpSync(src,dest,{recursive:true});console.log('Finora copiado para public/finora');}"
scripts.vercel-build: npm run build && echo "=== .next contents ===" && ls -la .next || true
